verdict.note: Source-level re-measure after gating activity on the leading status glyph (cleanActivity). Real captured tmux pane titles → cleanActivity output: 'ser581555022561'(=hostname)→null; 'Claude Code'(no glyph)→null; '✳ 更新Zcode项目及specs相关组件'→'更新Zcode项目及specs相关组件'; '⠐ Debug session naming fallback logic'→'Debug session naming fallback logic'. Boot-time host-name and bare-splash ticks suppressed; only glyph-led self-summaries reach the headline. Auxiliary deterministic evidence — browser screenshot of a booting row holding its placeholder still owed for product-level --pass.

Re-measure at HEAD after the selfSummary() refactor (behaviour identical to bb07648's glyph-gate). Now backed by a unit test (selfSummary.test.ts): host name 'ser581555022561'→null, bare 'Claude Code'→null, '✳/⠐ summary'→summary (glyph stripped), glyph-only→null. So the boot-time host-name and splash ticks never reach the headline; only the agent's glyph-led self-summary does. Deterministic+unit evidence; browser screenshot of a booting row holding its placeholder still owed for a product-level --pass.

Real screenshot of the top-left session window (live dashboard, 5 live sessions).
